measurement_note: Size is the number of tree nodes N; the deletion list contains every even value and therefore D=floor(N/2). Set membership keeps the reference at O(N+D), while the calibrated list-membership implementation performs O(ND) comparisons.

cases.name: benchmark: 63-node complete tree with even values deleted

benchmark: 999-node complete tree with even values deleted
